$comment: Companion config for ../quality-check.js. Documents the hook contract for the world_wide_project Vite+React+MapLibre package (packages/web). The hook itself reads these values inline; this file is the human/agent-facing source of truth for them.
name: quality-check
notes: WARN mode: exit 0 always. Surfaces tsc errors as additionalContext + stderr but never blocks.
The implementing agent's own auto-verification (pnpm -w build / tsc --noEmit) is the authoritative gate.
To make this hook BLOCKING on type errors, change process.exit(0) in quality-check.js's error branch to process.exit(2).
